channel.title: AI Mock Interview Podcast
channel.description: Voice-narrated DevOps, Cloud, Kubernetes, GCP, MLOps, GenAI, and interview-prep practice questions with model answers, organized by topic. Generated from the AI Mock Interviewer question bank. Listen, pause to think through your own answer, then hear a strong approach.
channel.itunes:author: Akhilesh Ranjan Singh

item.title: Behavioral and Screening Part 1
item.description: 17 interview practice questions (14 with a full model answer), from the Behavioral and Screening track. Each question is read aloud with a pause to think through your own answer before a strong model answer follows.
item.itunes:summary: 17 interview practice questions (14 with a full model answer), from the Behavioral and Screening track. Each question is read aloud with a pause to think through your own answer before a strong model answer follows.

item.title: Behavioral and Screening Part 2
item.description: 4 interview practice questions with full model answers, from the Behavioral and Screening track. Each question is read aloud with a pause to think through your own answer before a strong model answer follows.
item.itunes:summary: 4 interview practice questions with full model answers, from the Behavioral and Screening track. Each question is read aloud with a pause to think through your own answer before a strong model answer follows.

item.title: Security Part 1
item.description: 16 interview practice questions with full model answers, from the Security track. Each question is read aloud with a pause to think through your own answer before a strong model answer follows.
item.itunes:summary: 16 interview practice questions with full model answers, from the Security track. Each question is read aloud with a pause to think through your own answer before a strong model answer follows.

item.title: Security Part 2
item.description: 5 interview practice questions (4 with a full model answer), from the Security track. Each question is read aloud with a pause to think through your own answer before a strong model answer follows.
item.itunes:summary: 5 interview practice questions (4 with a full model answer), from the Security track. Each question is read aloud with a pause to think through your own answer before a strong model answer follows.
